title: gh#61: R2.1 — Add @sms/shared/post aggregate + PostInvariantError + planUpdate
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/61.
Backlog section: Candidate 2 — Post Lifecycle aggregate.

## Context

First PR in Candidate 2 (Post Lifecycle deepening). Establishes the aggregate module and migrates `updatePost` to use it. After this PR, user-driven update invariants live in one place and are unit-testable as pure functions.

See [BACKLOG.md](../blob/main/BACKLOG.md) → Architectural Deepening → Candidate 2.

## Scope

- Add `packages/shared/src/post/types.ts`:
  - `PostState` — canonical camelCase projection (the fields the state machine reads)
  - `PostPatch` — explicit subset of `posts.$inferInsert` writes, plus `bumpVersion: boolean`
  - `TransitionDecision` — discriminated union for transition planning (introduced in R2.3, but type lives here)
  - `PreflightState` — `{ mediaReady, tokenHealthy, budgetExhausted, rateLimitExhausted }` (introduced in R2.3)
- Add `packages/shared/src/post/errors.ts`:
  - `class PostInvariantError extends Error` with `kind` discriminator covering: `platform_mismatch`, `platform_immutable`, `not_editable`, `invalid_transition`, `version_mismatch`, `scheduled_at_required`, `scheduled_at_must_be_future`, `not_deletable`, `tag_not_found`, `thread_unsupported`, `media_pending`, `budget_exhausted`, `rate_limit_exhausted`, `token_unhealthy`, `already_published`, `not_scheduled`
- Add `packages/shared/src/post/aggregate.ts`:
  - `planUpdate(currentRow: PostState, input: UpdatePostInput, expectedVersion: number): PostPatch` — encapsulates current `updatePost` invariants (EDITABLE_STATES check, version match, platform immutability, transition validity, future-date check with the "edit-soon" nuance, optional `effectiveScheduledAt` derivation)
- Re-export from `@sms/shared/src/index.ts`
- Update `packages/api/src/services/post.service.ts` → `updatePost`:
  - Replace inline validation with `planUpdate(...)`
  - Tag and media coordination stays in the service (out of aggregate scope per ADR-0003)
  - Map `PostInvariantError` to existing HTTP responses at the route boundary (a small `kindToHttpStatus` table — can live in the route or service)
- Unit tests for `planUpdate`: every invariant path, every error `kind` produced

## Out of scope

- `planDelete` (R2.2)
- `planTransitionToPublishing` / `TransitionDecision` runtime logic (R2.3)
- `planRecordSuccess` / `planRecordFailure` (R2.4)
- Narrowing `PostServiceError` (R2.5 sweep)

## Acceptance

- `pnpm --filter @sms/shared build` and test pass
- `pnpm --filter @sms/api build` and test pass
- Existing `post.service.test.ts` cases for `updatePost` pass without modification beyond updated error type checks
- `rg "EDITABLE_STATES" packages/api/src/services/post.service.ts` returns no matches (logic moved to aggregate)

## References

- ADRs: [0003](../blob/main/docs/adr/0003-post-lifecycle-is-pure-functions-not-shared-repository.md), [0004](../blob/main/docs/adr/0004-publish-cycle-orchestration-stays-in-the-worker.md)
- CONTEXT.md: \`Post Lifecycle\`, \`PostPatch\`
- Depends on: nothing (first in Candidate 2 series)

history.reasoning: The original evidence is still materially open. packages/shared/src/post/types.ts, packages/shared/src/post/errors.ts, and packages/shared/src/post/aggregate.ts are missing; packages/shared/src/index.ts and packages/api/src/services/post.service.ts still exist. A repo-wide search finds no planUpdate, PostInvariantError, PostState, PostPatch, TransitionDecision, or PreflightState implementation/export under packages/shared/src or packages/api/src. updatePost still imports EDITABLE_STATES and transitionPost from @sms/shared and keeps the inline invariant logic in packages/api/src/services/post.service.ts:208-263, including platform immutability, editable-state check, version check, transition validation, and scheduledAt validation. The acceptance check rg "EDITABLE_STATES" packages/api/src/services/post.service.ts still matches. @sms/shared and @sms/api typechecks pass, but the targeted vitest command could not start in this read-only sandbox because Vite tried to mkdir packages/shared/node_modules/.vite-temp; that test limitation does not affect the source-code evidence that R2.1 is still unimplemented.
commands: rg -n "planUpdate|PostInvariantError|post/aggregate|post/types|post/errors" packages/shared/src packages/api/src packages/shared/package.json packages/api/package.json package.json

for p in packages/shared/src/post/types.ts packages/shared/src/post/errors.ts packages/shared/src/post/aggregate.ts packages/shared/src/index.ts packages/api/src/services/post.service.ts; do if test -e "$p"; then printf 'exists %s\n' "$p"; else printf 'missing %s\n' "$p"; fi; done

rg -n "updatePost\(|PostServiceError|platform_immutable|scheduledAt must be in the future|Invalid state transition|This post was modified elsewhere|This post is currently being published" packages/api/src/__tests__ packages/api/src/routes packages/api/src/services

history.reasoning: The original evidence paths now exist: packages/shared/src/post/types.ts, errors.ts, aggregate.ts, packages/shared/src/index.ts, and packages/api/src/services/post.service.ts. Current code defines PostState, PostPatch, TransitionDecision, PreflightState, PostInvariantError with the requested kind union, and planUpdate. packages/shared/src/index.ts re-exports the new post aggregate/error/type modules. updatePost now imports planUpdate and PostInvariantError, calls planUpdate for platform immutability, editable-state, version, transition, and scheduledAt validation, maps PostInvariantError kinds to PostServiceError statuses, and keeps tag/media coordination in the service. The acceptance search `rg -n "EDITABLE_STATES" packages/api/src/services/post.service.ts` returns no matches. Focused planUpdate tests now exist in packages/shared/src/__tests__/post-aggregate.test.ts and cover the produced invariant kinds plus the edit-soon scheduledAt nuance. `pnpm --filter @sms/shared exec tsc --noEmit` and `pnpm --filter @sms/api exec tsc --noEmit` both passed. The exact build/test acceptance commands could not complete in this read-only sandbox because tsc/Vitest attempted to write dist or temp/cache files, but those failures were environmental EPERM failures rather than source/type failures.
commands: for p in packages/shared/src/post/types.ts packages/shared/src/post/errors.ts packages/shared/src/post/aggregate.ts packages/shared/src/index.ts packages/api/src/services/post.service.ts; do if test -e "$p"; then printf 'exists %s\n' "$p"; else printf 'missing %s\n' "$p"; fi; done
pnpm --filter @sms/shared exec vitest run src/__tests__/post-aggregate.test.ts --configLoader runner
pnpm --filter @sms/api exec vitest run src/__tests__/services/post.test.ts src/__tests__/post-service-platform.test.ts --configLoader runner
